CustomField.description: Per-dimension approval lifecycle for the Quote's blended line-item discount (Not Required / Pending / Approved / Rejected). Automation-only: QuoteTriggerHandler escalates to Pending when the blended discount exceeds the threshold and the Quote Discount approval process records the decision. One of the three independent dimensions (discount / legal / finance) that replace the single conflated Approval_Status__c gate.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Discount approval lifecycle. Maintained by the Quote trigger and the discount approval process.
CustomField.label: Discount Approval Status
